chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.D-3738 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Disposed of matter: 1. For hearing of CMA No.1805/2022 2. For hearing of CMA No.1806/2022 23-09-2024 Mr. Yasir Ahmed Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Rajinder Kumar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ============= This is an application seeking review of our order dated 11.01.2022. We have heard the learned A.A.G. He submits that the Supreme Court had passed a judgment in some case after we had passed the order on 11.01.2022 and thus we should review our order. The exact case of the Supreme Court was not cited to us. Learned A.A.G. was also of the view that if subsequent to a final order or judgment, the Supreme Court passes a decision which would have an impact on the earlier judgment/order, then that in itself will be a ground of review. No law or authority which had laid down this principle was cited to us. Nor has learned A.A.G. been successful in satisfying us on the point of limitation. We have shown judicial restraint in not imposing costs on the State. Both the applications are dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Saleem
